title: lepidagathis calycina
intro: Lepidagathis calycina, also known as the Calyce Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lepidagathis calycina include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In traditional herbal medicine, Lepidagathis calycina is often prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to make a decoction, which is believed to help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and cough.
